metadata.note: Based on provided text snippet. Schema designed to scale for full 3540 entity dataset.

entities.name: Ars Notoria
entities.description: Angelic art of knowledge acquisition through prayer and notation; contains all arts and sciences in brief notes.

entities.name: Solomon
entities.description: Biblical king and magician; recipient of revelation from the Most High Creator.

entities.name: Most High Creator
entities.description: Source of revelation; ministered to Solomon upon the Alter of the Temple.

entities.name: Holy Angels
entities.description: Ministers of revelation; delivered knowledge upon altar of Temple.

entities.name: Apollonius
entities.description: Master of arts; successor/expositor of Solomon's art.

entities.name: Claire Fanger
entities.description: Scholar; citation: Visual Art in Two Manuscripts of the Ars Notoria.

entities.name: Michael Camille
entities.description: Scholar; citation: Visual Art in Two Manuscripts of the Ars Notoria.

entities.name: Hely Scemath Amazaz Hemel Sathusteon hheli Tamazam
entities.description: Science of transcendent purity; language origin Chaldee, Hebrew, Grecian.

entities.name: Theos Megale
entities.description: Mystical oration; language origin distorted from Hebrew, Greek, Chaldee.

entities.name: Splendor or Speculum of Wisdom
entities.description: Holy Prayer; language use four tongues: Chaldee, Greek, Hebrew and Latine.

entities.name: Assaylemath Assay Lemath Azzabue
entities.description: Part of the second revelation; language origin Chaldee, Hebrew, Grecian.
